user.title: Swiss Transport
user.description: Choose what to add: a departure board of a station, or a saved connection (from → to) — e.g. your daily commute.

station.title: Search a station
station.description: Type part of the station name to search.

pick.title: Pick the station
pick.description: Choose the exact stop, how many departures to show, and optionally limit the transport types.

data_description.ojp_token: Optional. Paste an Open Journey Planner (OJP 2.0) API token from opentransportdata.swiss to add fresher delays, cancellations, platform changes and occupancy. Leave empty to use opendata.ch only.

connection.title: Connection: from and to
connection.description: Type part of both station names to search.

connection_pick.title: Pick origin and destination
connection_pick.description: Choose the exact stops and how many connections to show.

abort.already_configured: This station or connection is already configured.

error.no_stations_found: No station found for this name.

data_description.ojp_token: Optional OJP 2.0 API token from opentransportdata.swiss for fresher delays, cancellations, platform changes and occupancy. Entered once, it enriches every station board. Leave empty to use opendata.ch only.
